S

set(TermAtom, int, int) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtom
 
setAtom(TermAtom) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode
Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value.
setHedge(Hedge) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode
Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value.
setMinLen(int) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.RigidityFnc
 
setMinLen(int) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.RigidityFncSubsequence
 
setMinLen(int) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.RigidityFncSubstring
 
SIGMA_EMPTY_REPLACEMENT - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.Substitution
Most likely you want to change Hedge.PRINT_PARAM_START and Hedge.PRINT_PARAM_END instead of this variable.
SIGMA_END - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.Substitution
Default = "} "
SIGMA_MAPTO - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.Substitution
Default = " -> "
SIGMA_START - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.Substitution
Default = "{"
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList.Alignment
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.Hedge
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermAtomList
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.CoordList
 
size() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.TinyList
guarantees complexity O(1) by definition
substitute(Variable, TermNode, TermNode) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.TermAtom
 
substitute(Variable, TermNode, TermNode) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.Variable
 
substitute(Variable, TermNode) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.Hedge
 
substitute(Variable, TermNode) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode
Substitutes one Variable by a TermNode recursively and returns the new TermNode.
Substitution - Class in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
This class represents a substitution, which is a mapping from variables to terms.
It is used inside the rule based system AntiUnifySystem to compute generalizations for given AntiUnifyProblems.
Substitution() - Constructor for class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.Substitution
 
SUFFIX_FreshHedgeVar - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.NodeFactory
 
SUFFIX_FreshTermVar - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.NodeFactory
